scripts.sync-data: cp data/venture-plan.json app/public/data/venture-plan.json && cp data/learnings.json app/public/data/learnings.json
scripts.prepare: npm run generate-plan && npm run sync-data
scripts.dev: npm run prepare && npm --prefix app run dev
scripts.build: npm run prepare && npm --prefix app run build
scripts.preview: npm run prepare && npm --prefix app run preview
